name: Sprint Burst
summary: Gain a burst of speed when you begin running.

name: Lithe
summary: Gain a burst of speed after performing a rushed vault.

name: Balanced Landing
summary: Reduce landing stagger and gain speed after falling.

name: Dead Hard
summary: Use a timed burst of endurance while injured.

name: Bond
summary: See the auras of nearby survivors.

name: Kindred
summary: Reveal useful aura information while a survivor is hooked.

name: Windows of Opportunity
summary: See nearby pallets, windows and breakable walls.

name: Empathy
summary: See the auras of injured or dying survivors at range.

name: Quick & Quiet
summary: Hide the loud-noise notification from rushed actions.

name: Dance With Me
summary: Hide scratch marks briefly after a fast vault or locker exit.

name: Lightweight
summary: Make scratch marks less consistent and easier to lose.

name: Resilience
summary: Perform several actions faster while injured.

name: Adrenaline
summary: Recover and gain speed when the exit gates become powered.

name: Hope
summary: Gain increased movement speed after the exit gates are powered.

name: Wake Up!
summary: See exit gates and open them faster during the endgame.

name: No One Left Behind
summary: Gain rescue and healing bonuses after the gates are powered.
